footer.tagline: The free English learning platform built around real listening practice.
footer.copyright: © 2026 VibeEnglish. Free English learning for everyone.

home.headline: From Struggling Listener to Confident English Speaker
home.sub: Master English with 1,745+ audio and video lessons. Train your ear, sharpen your pronunciation, and practice dictation — all completely free, forever.
home.aboutTitle: The free way to actually understand spoken English
home.aboutBody: VibeEnglish is an ESL/EFL platform built around listening. We give you native-speaker audio, interactive dictation, transcripts, and exercises across every skill — without fees and without sign-up walls.
home.step1Body: Pick anywhere from A1 (beginner) to C2 (proficient). New here? Start with A1 short stories.
home.step2Body: Train your ear with native-speaker audio and video. Adjust the speed and replay as often as you want.
home.step3Body: Type what you hear, sentence by sentence. Get instant feedback on every word.
home.step4Body: Check your transcript, save new vocabulary, and move to the next lesson when you're ready.
home.whySub: Real conversations don't come with subtitles. Train the way English is actually used.
home.benefit1Body: You absorb grammar and patterns the way native speakers did as kids — through repeated, contextual exposure.
home.benefit2Body: Hear how vowels really sound, where stress lands, and how words link together in fast speech.
home.benefit3Body: Dictation forces your brain to focus on every sound — far more effective than passive watching.
home.benefit4Body: Movies, podcasts, meetings, calls — practice content that mirrors the English you'll actually use.
home.cefrTitle: From beginner to proficient — know where you stand
home.featuresTitle: Everything you need in one place
home.examTitle: Prepare for the world's biggest English exams
home.ctaStripSub: Start your first lesson in under 30 seconds. No card, no email, no catch.

categoriesDesc.short-stories: Bite-sized fiction graded by level. Perfect for daily practice.
